_meta.sourceFloor: first substantive definition; exact title then capitalized proper-name fallback

label: you
title: you
definition: {{lb|en|object pronoun}} The [[people]] spoken, or written to, as an object. {{defdate|from 9th c.}}

label: the
title: the
definition: {{n-g|Used before a noun phrase, including a simple noun}}

label: to
title: to
definition: {{non-gloss|A particle used for marking the following verb as an [[infinitive]].}}

label: and
title: and
definition: As a coordinating conjunction; expressing two elements to be taken together or in addition to each other.

label: that
title: that
definition: {{non-gloss|Introducing a clause that is the object of a verb, especially a reporting verb or verb expressing belief, knowledge, perception, etc.}}

label: what
title: what
definition: {{lb|en|interrogative}} {{U|which}}, especially which of an open-ended set of possibilities.

label: we
title: we
definition: Two or more people including or consisting of the speaker(s)/writer(s).

label: this
title: this
definition: The (thing) here {{qualifier|used in indicating something or someone nearby}}.

label: your
title: your
definition: Belonging to you; of you; related to you (singular; one owner).

label: 're
title: 're
definition: {{lb|en|informal}} {{form of|en|contracted form|are}} {{gloss|inflection of the verb "to be"}}

label: they
title: they
definition: {{senseid|en|third-person plural nominative}} {{lb|en|the third-person plural nominative}} A group of entities previously mentioned. {{defdate|since 13th c.}}

label: 'll
title: 'll
definition: {{U|will}}, [[shall]] {{qualifier|marking the [[future]] tense or other modal sense}}.

label: she
title: she
definition: {{lb|en|personal}} The [[female]] (typically) person or animal previously mentioned or implied.

label: if
title: if
definition: [[supposing|Supposing]] that, [[assuming]] that, in the [[circumstance]]s that; {{ng|used to introduce a [[condition]] that may be (or prove to be) either true or false.}}

label: him
title: him
definition: {{non-gloss|A masculine pronoun; [[he]] as a grammatical object.}}

label: her
title: her
definition: Belonging to [[she|her]] (belonging to that female person or animal, or in poetic or old-fashioned language that ship, city, season, etc).

label: 've
title: 've
definition: {{U|have}} {{q|in its sense marking the [[perfect]] or [[retrospective]] aspect}}.

label: when
title: when
definition: {{lb|en|interrogative}} At what time? At which time? Upon which occasion or circumstance? {{non-gloss|Used to introduce direct or indirect questions about time.}}

label: would
title: would
definition: {{n-g|Past tense of {{m|en|will}}; usually followed by a bare infinitive.}}

label: our
title: our
definition: Belonging to [[us]], excluding the person(s) being addressed {{q|exclusive ''our''}}.

label: gonna
title: gonna
definition: {{lb|en|colloquial}} {{non-gloss|A [[modal]] used to express a future action that is being planned or prepared for in the present.}}

label: because
title: because
definition: By or for the [[cause]] that; on this [[account]] that; for the [[reason]] that.

label: anything
title: anything
definition: Any [[object]], [[act]], [[state]], [[event]], or [[fact]] [[whatsoever]]; a thing of any kind; something or other.

label: their
title: their
definition: {{senseid|en|plural}} {{non-gloss|Belonging to, from, of, or relating to, [[them]] (plural).}}

label: than
title: than
definition: {{non-gloss|Used in comparisons, to introduce the basis of comparison.}}

label: which
title: which
definition: {{lb|en|interrogative}} What, of those mentioned or implied.

label: else
title: else
definition: {{lb|en|postpositive|used only with indefinite or interrogative pronouns}} [[other|Other]]; in [[addition]] to previously mentioned items.

label: since
title: since
definition: From a specified time in the past.

label: myself
title: myself
definition: {{lb|en|reflexive pronoun}} [[me|Me]], as direct or indirect object {{non-gloss|the speaker as the object of a verb or preposition, when the speaker is also the subject}}. {{defdate|from 9th c.}}

label: until
title: until
definition: Up to the time of (something happening); pending.

label: shall
title: shall
definition: {{non-gloss|Used before a verb to indicate the simple future tense in the first person singular or plural.}}

label: yours
title: yours
definition: That or those belonging to [[you]]; {{n-g|the possessive second-person singular pronoun used without a following noun}}.

label: whoa
title: whoa
definition: [[stop|Stop]] (''especially when [[command]]ing a [[horse]] or imitative thereof''); [[calm down]]; [[slow down]].

label: anybody
title: anybody
definition: Any one out of an [[indefinite]] number of [[person]]s; [[anyone]]; [[any]] [[person]].

label: himself
title: himself
definition: {{lb|en|reflexive pronoun}} [[him|Him]]; {{non-gloss|the male object of a verb or preposition that also appears as the subject}}

label: cannot
title: cannot
definition: [[can#Verb|Can]] [[not]]; be [[unable]] to (whether due to physical inability, logical impossibility, etc.).

label: eh
title: eh
definition: {{lb|en|informal|chiefly|Canada|Upper Midwestern US|New Zealand|AU|UK|Irish|South Africa|India|HK|Singapore|Commonwealth}} {{n-g|Used as a [[tag question]], to emphasise what goes before or to request that the listener express an opinion about what has been said.}}

label: during
title: during
definition: For all of a given time [[interval]]; [[throughout]]; [[in]]; [[pending]].

label: whether
title: whether
definition: {{non-gloss|Introduces a simple indirect question (without a correlative)}}.

label: feels
title: feels
definition: {{lb|en|archaic}} {{plural of|en|feel}}, sensory perceptions that mainly or solely involve the sense of touch

label: whose
title: whose
definition: {{lb|en|interrogative}} Of [[whom]], belonging to [[whom]]; which person's or people's.

label: upon
title: upon
definition: {{n-g|A higher-register or more formal alternative to '''''[[on]]''''' in most, though not all, prepositional uses.}}

label: themselves
title: themselves
definition: {{lb|en|reflexive pronoun}} {{non-gloss|The reflexive case of '''[[they]]''', the [[third person|third-person]] plural [[personal pronoun]].}} The group of people, animals{{,}} or objects previously mentioned, as the object of a verb or following a preposition {{qualifier|also used for emphasis}}.

label: herself
title: herself
definition: {{lb|en|reflexive pronoun}} [[her|Her]]; {{non-gloss|the female object of a verb or preposition that also appears as the subject.}}

label: ourselves
title: ourselves
definition: {{lb|en|reflexive}} [[us|Us]]; {{non-gloss|the group including the speaker as the object of a verb or preposition when that group also is the subject.}}

label: itself
title: itself
definition: {{lb|en|reflexive pronoun}} [[it]]; {{non-gloss|A thing as the object of a verb or preposition that also appears as the subject}}

label: whom
title: whom
definition: {{lb|en|interrogative}} What person or people; which person or people.

label: jane
title: jane
definition: {{lb|en|obsolete}} A [[silver]] Genovese [[coin]], first used in England in the 14th century.

label: although
title: although
definition: [[though|Though]], [[even though]], [[in spite of]] or [[despite]] the fact that: {{non-gloss|introducing a clause that expresses a concession.}}

label: tommy
title: tommy
definition: {{lb|en|UK|slang}} A British infantryman, especially one from World War I. {{ellipsis|en|Tommy Atkins}}.

label: nor
title: nor
definition: {{lb|en|literary}} And... not ({{non-gloss|introducing a negative statement, without necessarily following one}}).

label: eddie
title: Eddie
definition: {{n-g|A [[diminutive]] of [[Edward]], [[Edgar]], [[Edwin]], or other male [[given name]]s beginning with Ed-.}}

label: among
title: among
definition: Of a [[person#Noun|person]] or [[thing]]: [[in the midst of]] and [[surround#Verb|surrounded]] by (other people or things).

label: onto
title: onto
definition: Arriving [[upon]] or on [[top]] of (speaking of a physical or metaphorical movement).

label: roger
title: roger
definition: {{lb|en|radio|_|telecommunications|procedure word}} [[received|Received]] {{qualifier|used in radio communications to acknowledge that a message has been received and understood}}

label: heads
title: heads
definition: {{non-gloss|A shouted [[warning]] that something is falling from above}}, mind your heads; [[heads-up]].

label: jeff
title: jeff
definition: {{lb|en|slang|printing|intransitive}} To play or [[gamble]] with [[em quad]]s, throwing them as [[dice]].

label: dan
title: dan
definition: {{lb|en|obsolete}} {{non-gloss|A title of honour or respect similar to "master" or "Sir", used of historical and legendary figures of the past.}}

label: eric
title: eric
definition: {{lb|en|historical}} A [[fine]] paid as [[compensation]] for violent crimes.

label: disappeared
title: disappeared
definition: {{lb|en|informal|euphemism}} Caused to disappear by someone, often for political reasons.

label: san
title: san
definition: An [[Ancient Greek]] letter representing {{IPAchar|/s/}} (uppercase [[Ϻ]], lowercase [[ϻ]]), originally used in some dialects instead of [[sigma]].

label: brian
title: brian
definition: {{lb|en|dialectal|Northern England}} To [[keep]] [[fire]] at the mouth of (as of an [[oven]]), to give [[light]] or to preserve [[heat]].

label: gosh
title: gosh
definition: {{lb|en|minced oath|euphemism}} {{n-g|A mild expression of surprise or enthusiasm.}}

label: william
title: William
definition: {{lb|en|World War II era|joint US/[[RAF]]}} [[radiotelephony]] clear-code word for the letter W.

label: nights
title: nights
definition: {{1|at night}} {{gl|during night-time, especially on a regular basis}}.

label: including
title: including
definition: [[such as|Such as]], [[among]] which; {{non-gloss|introducing one or more parts of the group or topic just mentioned.}}

label: alice
title: Alice
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Germanic languages}} popular in England since the Middle Ages.

label: laura
title: laura
definition: {{lb|en|historical|Roman Catholic Church}} A number of [[hermitage]]s or cells in the same neighborhood occupied by [[anchorite]]s who were under the same superior

label: yourselves
title: yourselves
definition: {{lb|en|reflexive pronoun}} {{non-gloss|Inflection of [[you]] (plural) used as the object of a verb or non-[[locative]] preposition in a clause whose subject is the same (the people addressed).}}

label: annie
title: Annie
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Ann}}. Also, a popular given name in the 19th century.

label: heh
title: heh
definition: The fifth letter of many Semitic alphabets ([[Phoenician]] 𐤄, [[Aramaic]] 𐡄, [[Hebrew]] ה, [[Syriac]] ܗ, [[Arabic]] ه, and others).

label: fred
title: Fred
definition: {{n-g|A short version of [[Frederick]], [[Alfred]], or [[Wilfred]], also used as a formal male [[given name]].}}

label: kyle
title: kyle
definition: {{lb|en|Scotland}} A [[narrow#Adjective|narrow]] [[arm#Noun|arm]] or [[channel#Noun|channel]] of the [[sea]] between an [[island#Noun|island]] and the [[mainland]], or between [[two]] islands.

label: thy
title: thy
definition: {{lb|en|archaic|EME|dialectal|literary}} {{form of|en|Possessive form|thou}}: that which belongs to [[thee]]; which belongs to you {{qualifier|singular}}.

label: julie
title: Julie
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=fr:Julie|eq=Julia|popular=in the latter half of the 20th century}}.

label: gordon
title: Gordon
definition: {{surname|en|Scottish habitational|from=Celtic languages}} for someone from Gordon, Berwickshire.

label: 'mon
title: 'mon
definition: {{alt form of|en|mon|t=creature in a video game, usually one which is captured, trained up and used in battles}}.

label: joey
title: joey
definition: The immature young of a [[marsupial]], notably a junior [[kangaroo]], but also a young [[wallaby]], [[koala]], etc.

label: maggie
title: maggie
definition: Any of several kinds of [[bird]] in the family {{taxfmt|Corvidae|family}}, especially {{taxfmt|Pica pica|species}}.

label: i-
title: i-
definition: {{lb|en|obsolete}} {{non-gloss|Used to form [[past participle]]s of [[verb]]s}}. {{alternative spelling of|en|y-}}.

label: barry
title: barry
definition: {{lb|en|heraldry}} A [[field]] divided [[transversely]] into several equal [[part]]s, and consisting of two different [[tincture]]s interchangeably [[dispose]]d.

label: jackie
title: Jackie
definition: A [[diminutive]] of the male [[given name]] [[Jack]], [[Jacques]] (and its [[cognates]]) or [[John]].

label: jesse
title: Jesse
definition: {{senseid|en|Q45090}}{{lb|en|biblical character}} The son of [[Obed]] and the father of king [[David]].

label: stan
title: stan
definition: {{senseid|en|obsessive fan}} {{lb|en|internet slang|sometimes|_|pejorative}} An extremely [[obsessive]] [[fan]] of a person, group, character, or creative work, particularly one whose [[fixation]] is [[unhealthy]] or [[intrusive]].

label: los
title: los
definition: {{lb|en|obsolete}} A medium-sized wildcat, most of them part of the genus ''[[Lynx]]''.

label: katie
title: Katie
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Catherine}} or any of its variant spellings.

label: vincent
title: vincent
definition: {{lb|en|historical|_|slang}} The [[victim]] or [[dupe]] in a betting game, especially [[bowls]].

label: steven
title: steven
definition: {{lb|en|now|_|chiefly|Northern England|Scotland|otherwise|archaic}} [[voice|Voice]], especially when loud or strong.

label: justin
title: Justin
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Latin|popular=in the English-speaking world since the 1970s}}.

label: betty
title: betty
definition: {{lb|en|slang}} A short [[bar]] used by [[thief|thieves]] to wrench [[door]]s open; a [[jimmy]]. {{defdate|from 17th century}}

label: nathan
title: Nathan
definition: {{senseid|en|Q319116}}{{lb|en|biblical character}} An [[Old Testament]] [[prophet]] who advised King [[David]].

label: uh-oh
title: uh-oh
definition: {{lb|en|informal}} {{n-g|An [[exclamation]] of [[error]], concern, or [[awareness]] of a problem.}}

label: jeremy
title: Jeremy
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Hebrew}}, English form of [[Jeremiah]]. Also used to anglicize Irish [[Diarmaid]] ([[Dermot]]).

label: hannah
title: Hannah
definition: {{senseid|en|Q2346367}}{{lb|en|biblical character}} Mother of the prophet [[Samuel]] in the Old Testament.

label: michelle
title: Michelle
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Hebrew}}, popular from the 1960s to the 1990s.

label: judy
title: Judy
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Judith}}, also used as a formal female [[given name]].

label: ouch
title: ouch
definition: An expression of one's own physical [[pain]].

label: ve
title: ve
definition: The name of the [[Appendix:Cyrillic script|Cyrillic script letter]] [[В]] / [[в]].

label: jess
title: jess
definition: {{lb|en|falconry}} A short [[strap]] [[fasten]]ed around the leg of a bird used in [[falconry]], to which a [[leash]] may be fastened.

label: vince
title: Vince
definition: Short form of the male [[given name]] '''[[Vincent]]'''.

label: hers
title: hers
definition: That or those belonging to [[her]]; {{n-g|the possessive case of [[she]], used without a following noun}}. {{defdate|from 12th c.}}

label: nate
title: Nate
definition: A [[diminutive]] of the male [[given name]]s [[Nathan]], [[Nathanael]] and [[Nathaniel]], and also a female given name [[Natalie]].

label: ethan
title: Ethan
definition: {{non-gloss|{{given name|en|male|from=Hebrew}}, of mostly American usage since the 18th century; popular in the 2000s.}}

label: lois
title: Lois
definition: {{lb|en|Bible}} The grandmother of [[Timothy]] who is mentioned in an epistle to him.

label: diane
title: Diane
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Latin|popular=in the middle of the 20th century}}

label: bo
title: bo
definition: An exclamation used to startle or frighten.

label: clicking
title: clicking
definition: The sound or action of a [[click]].

label: willie
title: willie
definition: {{alternative spelling of|en|willy}} <!--espionage sense, and probably several others-->

label: wendy
title: wendy
definition: {{lb|en|derogatory|slang|British|particularly northern UK}} A [[wuss]]; someone who is particularly cowardly.

label: juan
title: juan
definition: A [[scroll]] of a traditional [[Chinese]] [[book]], often (but not necessarily) corresponding to a single [[chapter]] or [[fascicle]].

label: sighing
title: sighing
definition: {{senseid|en|accompanied by a sigh}} [[accompany|Accompanied]] by or [[utter]]ed with a [[sigh]].<ref>{{R:OED|sighing|adj|5994926912}}</ref>

label: provided
title: provided
definition: Only if (the [[stipulation]] that follows is true).

label: mel
title: mel
definition: {{lb|en|psychoacoustics}} A [[unit]] of [[pitch]] on a [[scale]] of pitches perceived by listeners to be equally spaced from one another.

label: amongst
title: amongst
definition: {{non-gloss|Denotes a mingling or intermixing with distinct or separable objects. See usage note at [[amidst]].}}

label: liam
title: Liam
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Irish}}, currently popular in Ireland, England, Scotland, and the United States.

label: travis
title: travis
definition: {{lb|en|obsolete}} A wooden frame to confine a [[horse]] while the [[smith]] is setting his shoes.

label: brandon
title: Brandon
definition: {{surname|en|[[English]] [[habitational]]|from=Old English}} from any of several places of that name.

label: diego
title: diego
definition: {{lb|en|slang|ethnic slur}} A Spanish-speaker, especially from Latin America.

label: dammit
title: dammit
definition: {{lb|en|slang|vulgar}} Expressing anger, irritation, contempt, or disappointment.

label: poisoned
title: poisoned
definition: {{lb|en|of a living thing}} [[killed|Killed]], [[paralysed]], or [[harmed]] by receiving a [[dose]] of [[poison]].

label: kang
title: kang
definition: A [[traditional]] long [[platform]] of [[brick]], [[clay]] or [[concrete]], used for [[heating]] in colder parts of [[China]] and suitable for [[sleep]]ing on at night.

label: di
title: di
definition: {{ng|A meaningless syllable used when singing a tune or indicating a rhythm.}}

label: voted
title: voted
definition: That has been [[assign]]ed or [[establish]]ed by a vote.

label: lo
title: lo
definition: {{lb|en|archaic|_|except in the phrase [[lo and behold]]}} [[look]], [[see]], [[behold]] {{qualifier|in an imperative sense}}.

label: revealed
title: revealed
definition: {{lb|en|religion}} Of or pertaining to the [[revelation]]s of a [[divinity]] to [[humankind]].

label: trevor
title: Trevor
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Welsh}}, from {{bor|en|cy|Trefor}}. Popular in the UK in the 1950s and the 1960s.

label: del
title: del
definition: {{lb|en|analysis}} The symbol ∇ used to denote the [[gradient]] operator.

label: peggy
title: peggy
definition: Any of several small [[warbler]]s, the [[whitethroat]], etc.

label: dunno
title: dunno
definition: {{lb|en|informal}} {{pronunciation spelling of|en|[[do]] [[not]] [[know]]}}; {{pronunciation spelling of|en|[[does]] not know|nocap=1}}.

label: pam
title: pam
definition: The [[jack]] of [[clubs]] in [[loo]] played with hands of 5 [[card]]s.

label: cindy
title: Cindy
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Cynthia}} and [[Lucinda]]; also used as a formal female [[given name]].

label: kurt
title: Kurt
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Germanic languages}} borrowed from German, a contracted form of [[Konrad]].

label: ned
title: ned
definition: {{lb|en|Scotland|slang|pejorative|offensive}} A person, usually a youth, of low social standing and education, a violent disposition and with a particular style of dress (typically sportswear or Burberry), speech and behaviour.

label: yu
title: yu
definition: {{lb|en|archaeology|countable}} An ancient Chinese [[wine]]-bucket, often having a decorative cover.

label: vera
title: vera
definition: {{lb|en|Cockney rhyming slang}} A [[skin]] {{gloss|rolling paper for cigarettes}}.

label: caleb
title: Caleb
definition: {{lb|en|Biblical}} {{w|Caleb|''Caleb the son of Jephunneh''}}, an [[Israelite]] who entered [[Canaan]] with [[Joshua]].

label: but-
title: but-
definition: {{lb|en|organic chemistry}} Denotes the presence of four [[carbon]] [[atom]]s in the [[parent chain]] when forming names of [[organic compound]]s.

label: to-
title: to-
definition: {{lb|en|no longer productive}} [[apart]], [[away]], [[asunder]], in pieces; expressing [[separation]], [[negation]], or [[intensity]].<ref>Whitney, The Century dictionary and cyclopedia, to-</ref>

label: sharon
title: sharon
definition: {{lb|en|Philippines|slang}} Wrapping [[leftover]] foods to take home from any kind of [[social function]] such as a [[birthday]] or [[wedding]].

label: katherine
title: Katherine
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Ancient Greek}}, a popular spelling variant of [[Catherine]].

label: rodney
title: rodney
definition: A small [[Newfoundland]] [[wooden]] [[boat]] typically used by one person.

label: nigger
title: nigger
definition: {{lb|en|offensive|ethnic slur|vulgar|see [[nigger#Usage notes|usage notes]]}} A [[black]] [[person]]; a person of black [[African]] descent.

label: pedro
title: Pedro
definition: {{lb|en|games}} An American [[trick]]-taking [[card game]] of the [[all fours]] family.

label: theirs
title: theirs
definition: That or those belonging to [[them]]; {{n-g|the possessive case of ''[[they]]'', used without a following noun}}.

label: irene
title: irene
definition: {{lb|en|organic compound}} The [[hydrocarbon]] formed by [[dehydration]] of an [[irone]].

label: cathy
title: Cathy
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Catherine}} and of its variant forms, also used as a formal [[given name]] in the 20th century.

label: via
title: via
definition: A main [[road]] or [[highway]], especially in ancient Rome. ''(Mainly used in set phrases, below.)''

label: caitlyn
title: Caitlyn
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Irish}}, one of the modern spelling variants of [[Caitlin]].

label: sonia
title: Sonia
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Russian}} {{qualifier|the usual UK spelling of the name which is spelled [[Sonya]] in the US}}.

label: vicky
title: Vicky
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Victoria}}, also used as a formal given name.

label: skies
title: skies
definition: {{plural of|en|sky}} though essentially synonymous with singular form; the heavens; the firmament; the atmosphere.

label: presented
title: presented
definition: {{lb|en|mathematics|of a [[group]]}} Having a specified [[presentation]], or a presentation with specified properties.

label: facebook
title: facebook
definition: A [[reference]] [[book]] or [[electronic]] [[directory]] [[contain]]ing the [[photographs]] and [[name]]s of various [[individual]]s.

label: ou
title: ou
definition: A probably extinct species of Hawaiian [[honeycreeper]], {{taxlink|Psittirostra psittacea|species}}.

label: rudy
title: rudy
definition: {{lb|en|sports|aerial freestyle skiing}} An [[acrobatic]] [[maneuver]] involving two and a half [[twist]]s.

label: whew
title: whew
definition: {{n-g|An expressive sound made indicating the [[release]] of one's inner [[tension]]; the release of [[breath]]; an expression of [[relief]].}}

label: jeffrey
title: Jeffrey
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Germanic languages}}, the usual U.S. spelling of [[Geoffrey]]. Popular in the latter half of the 20th century.

label: stevie
title: Stevie
definition: A [[diminutive]] of the male [[given name]]s [[Stephen]] and [[Steven]].

label: fiona
title: Fiona
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Scottish Gaelic}}, in regular use since the 20th century, first in Scotland, then in England.

label: lex
title: lex
definition: {{lb|en|computing}} To perform [[lexical analysis]]; to [[convert]] a [[character]] stream to a [[token]] stream as a preliminary to [[parsing]].

label: blaming
title: blaming
definition: The act of [[accusing]] or [[assigning]] culpability to.

label: kathy
title: Kathy
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Katherine,Kathleen|addl=also used as a formal given name.}}

label: bon
title: Bon
definition: An [[indigenous]] [[Tibetan]] [[religion]], in many ways akin to [[Tibetan Buddhism]].

label: denny
title: Denny
definition: A [[diminutive]] of the male [[given name]]s [[Denis]] or [[Dennis]].

label: sylvia
title: Sylvia
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Latin}}, a popular spelling variant of [[Silvia]].

label: hal
title: hal
definition: A special temporary state of consciousness, generally understood to be the product of a Sufi's spiritual practices while on his way toward God.

label: theo
title: theo
definition: {{lb|en|informal}} The amount of a [[gambler]]'s [[theoretical]] [[loss]]es based on [[typical]] [[play]].

label: cousins
title: cousins
definition: {{senseid|en|espionage}}{{lb|en|espionage|slang}} The [[American#Adjective|American]] [[intelligence]] [[service#Noun|services]] (from a [[British#Adjective|British]] [[perspective#Noun|perspective]]) or the British intelligence services (from an American perspective).

label: reggie
title: reggie
definition: {{lb|en|slang}} Being regular [[marijuana]], as opposed to good-quality marijuana.

label: wong
title: wong
definition: {{lb|en|obsolete|or|dialectal|chiefly in placenames}} A [[field]] or other piece of land.

label: rehab
title: rehab
definition: {{lb|en|informal|uncountable}} [[rehabilitation|Rehabilitation]], especially to treat the use of recreational drugs.

label: chelsea
title: Chelsea
definition: {{place|en|urban area|in west|city/London|on the north bank of the river|river/Thames|in the|lbor/Kensington and Chelsea|co/Greater London}} {{q|[[OS]] grid ref TQ2778}}.

label: sabrina
title: Sabrina
definition: {{lb|en|Celtic mythology}} A legendary Celtic [[princess]] who gave her name to the river [[Severn]].

label: kiddo
title: kiddo
definition: {{lb|en|US|Australia|NZ|Philippines}} A close [[friend]]; especially used as a form of [[address]].

label: feared
title: feared
definition: Pertaining to someone or thing that causes great fear in others.

label: forcing
title: forcing
definition: The act by which someone or something is forced.

label: a-
title: a-
definition: {{senseid|en|up}}{{lb|en|no longer productive}} {{non-gloss|Forming verbs with the sense ''away'', ''up'', ''on'', ''out''.}}

label: bert
title: Bert
definition: A [[diminutive]] form of male [[given name]]s containing the element ''bert'', such as [[Albert]] or [[Robert]], also used as a formal given name.

label: polly
title: polly
definition: {{lb|en|UK|slang}} A [[prefect]] at {{w|Uppingham School}} in Rutland, England.

label: kira
title: kira
definition: An ankle-length [[dress]] traditionally worn by women in [[Bhutan]].

label: lester
title: Lester
definition: {{surname|en|from=Old English}} derived from the English place name [[Leicester]].

label: jacques
title: jacques
definition: {{label|en|obsolete}} {{alt form|en|jakes}}: a [[place]] to [[urinate]] or [[defecate]], an [[outhouse]] or [[lavatory]].

label: fiancé
title: fiancé
definition: A [[man]] who is [[engage]]d to be [[marry|married]]; the man to whom one is engaged; an intended.

label: hanged
title: hanged
definition: {{lb|en|legal}} {{infl of|en|hang||ed-form}} (now only when referring to the method of [[execution]], elsewhere [[hung]] is used)

label: fiancée
title: fiancée
definition: {{lb|en|somewhat|formal}} A [[woman]] who is [[engage]]d to be [[marry|married]]; the woman to whom one is engaged.

label: serena
title: serena
definition: {{obsolete form of|en|serene|id=rain|pos=noun|t=fine rain from a cloudless sky after sunset}}.

label: omar
title: omar
definition: A [[glacial erratic]] piece of (typically smooth) dark siliceous greywacke<!-- (ranging in size from a pebble to a boulder)--> that exhibits a hemispherical pit or hole (as a result of selective dissolution of carbonate concretions within the greywacke), originating in the Omarolluk Formation and carried by glaciers throughout Canada and the United States.

label: señor
title: señor
definition: A Spanish term of address equivalent to sir or Mr., used alone or capitalized and prefixed to the name of a married or an older man.

label: jared
title: Jared
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Hebrew}} of [[Biblical]] origin; rare in the English-speaking world until the 1960s.

label: lynn
title: Lynn
definition: {{lb|en|colloquial}} {{n-g|A local name for}} {{l|en|King's Lynn}}, Norfolk, England.

label: susie
title: Susie
definition: A [[diminutive]] of [[Susan]] and of related female [[given name]]s.

label: handcuffs
title: handcuffs
definition: {{senseid|en|Q15808}} A [[fastening]] consisting of two [[metal]] [[ring]]s, designed to go around a person's [[wrist]]s, and connected by a [[chain]] or [[hinge]].

label: recommended
title: recommended
definition: That one [[recommend]]s {{gloss|often by a person, community, or authoritative body}}.

label: nadia
title: Nadia
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Russian}} used since the twentieth century.

label: fran
title: Fran
definition: A [[diminutive]] of the female [[given name]]s [[Frances]] and [[Francine]].

label: hyah
title: hyah
definition: a call, often to horses, livestock, or cattle, to move forward or proceed

label: goals
title: goals
definition: {{lb|en|Internet slang|also in compounds}} Extremely [[admirable#Adjective|admirable]]; worthy of being set as a [[goal#Noun|goal]] and [[emulate#Verb|emulated]].

label: cory
title: cory
definition: Any fish belonging to the genus {{taxfmt|Corydoras|genus}}, a group of [[South American]] [[freshwater]] [[catfish]].

label: kara
title: kara
definition: {{lb|en|Sikhism}} A [[bangle]] worn by [[Sikh]]s, one of the [[five Ks]], to remind them to do God's work.

label: klaus
title: Klaus
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Ancient Greek}}, an alternative spelling of [[Claus]].

label: printed
title: printed
definition: {{lb|en|of information or a document}} [[put down|Put down]] on paper by a [[printing press]] or a computer [[printer]].

label: brody
title: brody
definition: {{lb|en|slang}} Intentionally spinning in circles and sliding in an automobile.

label: flattered
title: flattered
definition: In a [[positive]] [[mood]] because of a comment or action which causes one to feel [[proud]] of oneself.

label: jang
title: jang
definition: Fermented ingredients used as the base for many Korean dishes and sauces.

label: shelly
title: shelly
definition: Composed of the [[shell]]s of dead marine creatures

label: café
title: café
definition: {{senseid|en|Q30022}}A [[coffee shop]]; an establishment selling [[coffee]] and sometimes other [[non-alcoholic]] [[beverage]]s, simple [[meal]]s or [[snack]]s, with a facility to consume them on the premises.

label: condemned
title: condemned
definition: Having received a [[curse]] to be doomed to suffer eternally.

label: sadie
title: Sadie
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Sarah}}. Also a popular formal [[given name]] in the 19th century.

label: sensei
title: sensei
definition: A [[martial arts]] instructor; especially one for a [[Japanese]] martial art.

label: kenneth
title: Kenneth
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Scottish Gaelic}}, originally used in Scotland, popular in all English-speaking countries in the 20th century.

label: toni
title: Toni
definition: {{given name|en|female|dimof=Antonia}}, sometimes used as a formal given name.

label: associated
title: associated
definition: {{lb|en|of a person or thing}} Connected with something or another person.

label: antoine
title: Antoine
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=French}} occasionally borrowed from French, mostly in the U.S.

label: stacy
title: stacy
definition: {{lb|en|incel slang}} {{alt form|en|Stacy||attractive woman who is sexually active}}.

label: escaping
title: escaping
definition: The act of one who escapes; an escape.

label: jun
title: jun
definition: A monetary unit of [[North Korea]] and formerly of [[South Korea]], equal to one hundredth of a [[won]].

label: imagining
title: imagining
definition: Something imagined; a figment of the imagination.

label: holt
title: holt
definition: A small piece of [[woodland]] or a woody [[hill]]; a [[copse]].

label: lori
title: Lori
definition: A female [[given name]], popular in the US in the 1960s.

label: geoffrey
title: Geoffrey
definition: {{given name|en|male|from=Germanic languages|popular=in the U.K. in the 20th century}}.

label: restored
title: restored
definition: Pertaining to something or someone [[renew]]ed or rebuilt.

label: natasha
title: Natasha
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=Russian, Ukrainian}} borrowed from [[Russian]] in the twentieth century, diminutive of [[Natalia]] and [[Natalya]].

label: billie
title: Billie
definition: {{given name|en|male,female|from=Germanic languages}} derived from [[Bill]], the diminutive of [[William]].

title: cho
definition: {{lb|en|dialectal|nonstandard}} {{pronunciation spelling of|en|your|addl=especially when preceded by a {{IPAchar|/t/}}}} sound.

label: oz

definition: {{abbreviation of|en|ounce}}; any of various units of weight and volume.

label: julio

label: yuri
title: yuri
definition: {{lb|en|especially|Japanese fiction}} A narrative or visual work featuring a [[romantic]] or [[sexual]] [[relationship]] between women.

title: superhero
definition: Any [[fictional]] crime-fighting character, often with [[supernatural]] powers or equipment, in popular children's and fantasy [[literature]]; a fictional hero who does great things.

label: challenged
title: challenged
definition: {{lb|en|euphemism}} [[disabled|Disabled]]; [[lacking]] some [[physical]] or [[mental]] [[attribute]] or [[skill]]; {{ng|used after adverbs to make [[politically correct]] adjectives.}}

label: millie
title: millie
definition: {{lb|en|informal|Northern Ireland|dated|19th century|pejorative|_|or|_|affectionate}} A [[mill]] [[worker]], usually a young [[working-class]] woman working in the factories of Ireland's [[w:Irish linen|linen]] industry.<ref>BBC Newsline broadcast 27th of May 2010</ref>

label: scully
title: scully
definition: An [[obstacle]] set up against [[military]] [[vehicle]]s; a {{w|Czech hedgehog}}.

label: nat
title: nat
definition: A [[spirit]] in [[Burmese]] mythology, whose cult is followed alongside [[Buddhism]].

label: oppa

definition: {{lb|en|manhwa|women's speech}} {{ng|An affectionate [[term of address]] for an [[older]] [[brother]] or somewhat older [[man]].}}

label: marianne

title: competing

label: busting
title: busting

label: priya
title: Priya
definition: {{given name|en|female|from=India}}. A common Hindu female name which means [[beloved]]. It is usually used in conjunction with another name, mostly those of [[gods]] to imply "beloved of ________".

title: yum

definition: {{surname|en|English|from=given names}} derived from a medieval diminutive of [[Eustace]].

label: triggered

definition: {{non-gloss|Uttered to indicate disgust usually toward an objectionable taste or odour.}} {{defdate|from 1966}}

definition: {{surname|en|from=occupations}} for a dyer or seller of ([[scarlet]]) fabric.

label: feng

label: zeke

definition: {{given name|en|male|dimof=Ezekiel}}, also used as a formal given name.

label: onboard

definition: [[carry|Carried]] or [[used]] on or in a [[vehicle]] or [[vessel]].

label: ferguson
